**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the v5.7 multi-dimensional semantic and spatial demotion probe. This is a set of commercial data full of contradictions and 'buzzword-riding' vocabulary. Officials classified this enterprise under the low-end 'Household Electric Appliance Manufacturing', but the beginning of its business license piles up extremely hardcore cutting-edge tech concepts: 'R&D and production of robots, drones, and unmanned vehicle products'. Subsequently, it mixes in dozens of manufacturing items with massive spans, from 'industrial automatic control systems' to 'gas separation and purification equipment' and 'plastic products'. However, the forensic probe immediately punctured this facade of 'high-tech heavy industry': the enterprise's paid-in capital is 4.29 million, and the insured headcount is only 9 people. The most fatal aspect is its registered address: 'Rooms 701-705, Building 1, Artificial Intelligence Industrial Park'. On the 7th floor of an office building, using 9 people to simultaneously manufacture drones, unmanned vehicles, industrial control cabinets, and gas separation equipment is a complete violation of the laws of physics. Combined with its alternate email prefix 'hr@yzhijing.com', the system judges that this enterprise possesses a certain physical operational capability, but is absolutely not a heavy manufacturing plant. This is a [Micro R&D Team, System Integrator & Industrial Equipment Proxy] using 'electromechanical and automation' as its signboard. These 9 employees are primarily engaged in software development, blueprint design for electromechanical systems, and trading activities involving proxy purchasing of industrial valves and instrumentation.

**Risk Profile Summary:**

Operational Status: PROXY / INTEGRATOR / R&D STUDIO
